title: knautia arvensis subsp. polymorpha
intro: Knautia arvensis subsp. polymorpha, also known as field scabious or shepherd's needle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Dipsacaceae. It has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and combat infections. The medicinal properties of Knautia arvensis subsp. polymorpha have been found to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as an immunomodulator. Knautia arvensis subsp. polymorpha is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion, and can also be used in ointments and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
